queries.question: What textbooks are published by McGraw-Hill and what ebooks are also published by them?
queries.sql:
SELECT Textbooks.title
FROM Publisher JOIN Textbooks ON Publisher.id = Textbooks.publisherId
WHERE Publisher.name = "McGraw-Hill"
UNION
SELECT EBooks.title
FROM Publisher JOIN EBooks ON Publisher.id = EBooks.publisherId
WHERE Publisher.name = "McGraw-Hill"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?publisher a :Publishers .
    ?textbooks a :Textbooks .
    ?textbooks p:hasPublisher ?publisher .
    ?textbooks p:title ?title .
    ?publisher p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "McGraw-Hill")
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?publisher a :Publishers .
    ?ebooks a :EBooks .
    ?ebooks p:hasPublisher ?publisher .
    ?ebooks p:title ?title .
    ?publisher p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "McGraw-Hill")
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Show textbooks and ebooks that are published by McGraw-Hill.
queries.sql:
SELECT Textbooks.title
FROM Publisher JOIN Textbooks ON Publisher.id = Textbooks.publisherId
UNION
SELECT EBooks.title
FROM Publisher JOIN EBooks ON Publisher.id = EBooks.publisherId
WHERE Publisher.name = "McGraw-Hill"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?publisher a :Publishers .
    ?textbooks a :Textbooks .
    ?textbooks p:hasPublisher ?publisher .
    ?textbooks p:title ?title .
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?publisher a :Publishers .
    ?ebooks a :EBooks .
    ?ebooks p:hasPublisher ?publisher .
    ?ebooks p:title ?title .
    ?publisher p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "McGraw-Hill")
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show textbooks and ebooks that are published by McGraw-Hill.
